title: GatewayScopeRule
description: Typed gateway allowlist entry that binds destination identity to permitted operations, egress data classes, and redirect posture.

scope_kind.description: Closed gateway scope-rule kind; unknown kinds fail closed.

gateway_role_kind.description: Optional concrete gateway role this scope rule is bound to.

entry_id.description: Optional stable allowlist entry identity for deterministic audit attribution.

permitted_operations.description: Allowed gateway operations for this destination from the closed shared operation vocabulary.

allowed_egress_data_classes.description: Allowed outbound data classes for this destination and operation set.

redirect_posture.description: Redirect handling posture. Redirects may only target allowlisted destinations.

max_timeout_seconds.description: Optional request timeout bound for this rule.

max_response_bytes.description: Optional response-size bound for this rule.

git_ref_update_policy.description: Optional signed policy set for git ref updates in canonical ref namespace.

git_tag_update_policy.description: Optional signed policy set for git tag updates in canonical ref namespace.

git_pull_request_base_ref_policy.description: Optional signed policy set for pull-request base refs in canonical ref namespace.

git_pull_request_head_namespace_policy.description: Optional signed constrained namespace policy set for pull-request head refs.

gitCanonicalRef.description: Canonical git ref in fully qualified refs/... form.

rule_kind.description: Rule kind for an exact ref match.

ref.description: Exact canonical ref allowed by this rule.

gitRefPrefixGlobRule.description: Constrained prefix-glob git namespace allowlist rule.

rule_kind.description: Rule kind for a constrained namespace prefix match.

prefix.description: Canonical git ref namespace prefix ending in '/' that allows descendants in this namespace.

gitRefPolicyRule.description: One git ref-policy rule, either exact-match or constrained prefix-glob.

gitRefPolicySet.description: Signed policy set for canonical git ref updates with destructive actions denied by default.

rules.description: Allowed exact refs or constrained ref namespaces for this policy set.

allow_force_push.description: Destructive/non-fast-forward ref updates remain denied by default in v1.

allow_ref_deletion.description: Ref deletion remains denied by default in v1.

gitRefNamespacePolicySet.description: Signed policy set for canonical git head-ref namespaces using constrained prefix-glob rules.

rules.description: Allowed canonical head-ref namespace prefixes for pull-request sources.

then.description: Git-remote allowlist entries must carry explicit ref and pull-request policy sets.

else.description: Non-git destinations must not carry git-specific policy fields.
